placeOrder.question: How do I start selling on Vasty?
placeOrder.answer: Sign up for a vendor account, choose a subscription plan, and create your store. You can customize your storefront and start selling immediately.

paymentMethods.question: What are the subscription plans?
paymentMethods.answer: We offer Free, Starter ($29.99/mo), Pro ($79.99/mo), and Business ($199.99/mo) plans. Get 2 months free with annual billing.

shippingTime.question: Are there any transaction fees?
shippingTime.answer: No! Vasty charges zero transaction fees on all plans. You only pay your monthly or annual subscription.

returnPolicy.question: Can I customize my store?
returnPolicy.answer: Yes! Use our storefront builder to customize themes, colors, and layouts. Pro+ plans include premium themes and custom domains.

trackOrder.question: How do I track my order as a buyer?
trackOrder.answer: Go to 'My Orders' in your account. Click on any order to see tracking details provided by the vendor.

internationalShipping.question: Can I have multiple stores?
internationalShipping.answer: Yes! Store limits depend on your plan: Free (1), Starter (2), Pro (5), Business (unlimited).

trackOrder.question: How do I track my order?
trackOrder.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a confirmation email with tracking details. You can also track orders by logging into your account and visiting 'My Orders'. Each vendor handles their own shipping, so tracking information comes directly from the store you purchased from.

shippingOptions.question: How does shipping work on Vasty?
shippingOptions.answer: Each vendor on Vasty sets their own shipping rates and methods. Shipping options and costs are displayed at checkout. If you order from multiple stores, each order ships separately and may have different delivery times.

internationalShipping.question: Do vendors ship internationally?
internationalShipping.answer: International shipping availability varies by vendor. Check each store's shipping policy on their storefront page. Some vendors offer worldwide shipping while others may only ship domestically. Customs duties and taxes are the buyer's responsibility.

shippingTime.question: How long does shipping take?
shippingTime.answer: Delivery times depend on the vendor's location and shipping method. Most domestic orders arrive within 3-7 business days. Check the product page or vendor's store for specific shipping timeframes.

lostDamaged.question: What if my package is lost or damaged?
lostDamaged.answer: Contact the vendor directly through your order details page. Most vendors offer replacements or refunds for lost or damaged items. If you can't resolve the issue with the vendor, contact Vasty support and we'll help mediate.

changeAddress.question: Can I change my shipping address after ordering?
changeAddress.answer: Contact the vendor immediately through the order details page. If the order hasn't shipped yet, most vendors can update the address. Once shipped, you'll need to contact the shipping carrier directly.

returnPolicy.question: What is the return policy?
returnPolicy.answer: Return policies are set by individual vendors. Check the store's return policy before purchasing. Most vendors offer returns within 14-30 days for unused items. Some items like custom or personalized products may be non-returnable.

howToReturn.question: How do I return an item?
howToReturn.answer: Go to 'My Orders' in your account, select the order, and click 'Request Return'. The vendor will review your request and provide return instructions. Keep items in original condition with tags attached until the return is approved.

refundTime.question: When will I receive my refund?
refundTime.answer: Once the vendor receives and approves your return, refunds are typically processed within 5-7 business days. The refund goes to your original payment method and may take an additional 3-5 days to appear in your account.

exchange.question: Can I exchange an item?
exchange.answer: Exchange policies vary by vendor. Contact the vendor through your order to request an exchange. Many vendors prefer you return the original item for a refund and place a new order for the replacement.

defectiveItem.question: What if I received a defective or wrong item?
defectiveItem.answer: Contact the vendor immediately with photos of the issue. Vendors are required to resolve defective or incorrect orders. If the vendor is unresponsive, contact Vasty support for assistance.

sizeGuide.question: How do I start selling on Vasty?
sizeGuide.answer: Sign up for a vendor account, choose a subscription plan (Free, Starter, Pro, or Business), and create your store. You can customize your storefront, add products, and start selling immediately. No technical skills required!

authentic.question: What can I sell on Vasty?
authentic.answer: You can sell physical products across many categories including fashion, electronics, home goods, beauty, and more. Prohibited items include illegal products, counterfeit goods, and items that violate our terms of service. Check our seller guidelines for details.

restock.question: How much does it cost to sell on Vasty?
restock.answer: Vasty offers flexible pricing: Free plan (1 store, 10 products), Starter at $29.99/month, Pro at $79.99/month, and Business at $199.99/month. Get 2 months free with annual billing. There are no transaction fees on any plan!

preorder.question: How do I get paid for sales?
preorder.answer: Connect your bank account or payment method in your vendor dashboard. Payouts are processed automatically based on your payout schedule. You can view all transactions and earnings in your analytics dashboard.

inStock.question: Can I customize my store design?
inStock.answer: Yes! Vasty offers a powerful storefront builder with customizable themes, colors, fonts, and layouts. Pro and Business plans include premium themes and advanced customization options. You can also connect a custom domain.

careInstructions.question: Do you offer a mobile app for my store?
careInstructions.answer: Starter, Pro, and Business plans include a mobile app builder. Create a branded mobile app for your customers with your logo, colors, and products. Customers can shop, track orders, and receive push notifications.

paymentMethods.question: What subscription plans are available?
paymentMethods.answer: We offer 4 plans: Free (1 store, 10 products), Starter at $29.99/month (2 stores, unlimited products, custom domain, mobile app), Pro at $79.99/month (5 stores, mobile app, advanced analytics), and Business at $199.99/month (unlimited everything, API access, white-label).

paymentSecure.question: Is payment processing secure?
paymentSecure.answer: Absolutely! Vasty uses Stripe for secure payment processing. All transactions are encrypted with industry-standard SSL and we're PCI DSS compliant. We never store complete credit card information on our servers.

multiplePayment.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
multiplePayment.answer: Yes! You can change your subscription plan anytime from your billing settings. Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing period. Unused time is prorated.

paymentPlans.question: Do you offer annual billing discounts?
paymentPlans.answer: Yes! Get 2 months free when you choose annual billing. For example, the Pro plan is $66.67/month when billed annually ($799.99/year) instead of $79.99/month. Annual plans are billed upfront for the full year.

paymentDeclined.question: What happens if my subscription payment fails?
paymentDeclined.answer: If payment fails, we'll notify you and retry a few times. You have a grace period to update your payment method. If payment isn't received, your account may be downgraded to the Free plan and some features may be limited.

createAccount.question: How do I create an account?
createAccount.answer: Click 'Sign Up' and enter your email and password. You can also sign up with Google. Choose whether you want to shop (customer account) or sell (vendor account). Vendor accounts can also shop on the marketplace.

forgotPassword.question: I forgot my password. What should I do?
forgotPassword.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your email. You'll receive a reset link within minutes. Click the link and create a new password. For security, reset links expire after 24 hours.

updateAccount.question: How do I manage my store settings?
updateAccount.answer: Go to your Vendor Dashboard and click 'Store Settings'. You can update your store name, description, logo, banner, contact information, shipping policies, return policies, and more. Changes save automatically.

deleteAccount.question: Can I have multiple stores?
deleteAccount.answer: Yes! The number of stores depends on your plan: Free (1 store), Starter (2 stores), Pro (5 stores), Business (unlimited). Each store can have its own branding, products, and custom domain.

emailPreferences.question: How do I add team members to my store?
emailPreferences.answer: Go to Store Settings > Team Members. Invite team members by email and assign roles (Admin, Manager, Staff). Team member limits depend on your plan: Free (1), Starter (2), Pro (5), Business (15).

physicalStores.question: What is the Vasty marketplace?
physicalStores.answer: The Vasty marketplace is where customers discover and shop from all vendor stores in one place. Your products appear in marketplace search results, category pages, and recommendations, giving you exposure to more potential customers.

contactService.question: How can I contact support?
contactService.answer: Email us at support@vasty.shop for any questions. We typically respond within 24 hours. For urgent vendor issues, use the chat widget in your dashboard. Check our Help Center for instant answers to common questions.

giftCards.question: Can I use my own domain?
giftCards.answer: Yes! Starter, Pro, and Business plans support custom domains. Go to Store Settings > Domain and add your domain. We provide SSL certificates automatically. Your store will be accessible at your custom domain.

promotions.question: How do I create promotions and discounts?
promotions.answer: In your Vendor Dashboard, go to Marketing > Promotions. Create percentage or fixed discounts, set minimum purchase requirements, limit usage, and schedule start/end dates. Share promo codes with your customers.

priceMatch.question: What analytics are available?
priceMatch.answer: Your dashboard shows sales, revenue, orders, top products, customer insights, and traffic sources. Pro and Business plans include advanced analytics with detailed reports, conversion tracking, and exportable data.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.p1: At Vasty ("we," "our," or "us"), we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website, mobile application, or use our services (collectively, the "Service").
introduction.p2: This Privacy Policy applies to all information collected through our Service and any related services, sales, marketing, or events. Please read this Privacy Policy carefully. By using our Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.
introduction.p3: If you do not agree with the terms of this Privacy Policy, please do not access or use our Service. We reserve the right to make changes to this Privacy Policy at any time and for any reason. We will alert you about any changes by updating the "Last Updated" date of this Privacy Policy.
introduction.p4: This Privacy Policy complies with applicable privacy laws and regulations, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), and other relevant data protection legislation.

informationWeCollect.title: 2. Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.personalInfoDesc: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register on the Service, make a purchase, subscribe to our newsletter, or otherwise contact us. The personal information we collect may include:
personalInfoList: Name and contact information (email address, phone number, mailing address)
Demographic information (age, gender, date of birth)
Social media profile information (when you connect social accounts)
informationWeCollect.paymentInfoDesc: When you make a purchase, we collect payment information necessary to process your transaction. This may include:
paymentInfoList: Credit card or debit card numbers (tokenized and encrypted)
PayPal account information or other payment service details
informationWeCollect.paymentInfoNote: Please note that we do not store your complete credit card information on our servers. All payment information is processed securely through third-party payment processors that comply with Payment Card Industry Data Security Standards (PCI DSS).
informationWeCollect.autoCollectedDesc: When you access our Service, we automatically collect certain information about your device and usage patterns, including:
autoCollectedList: Device type, operating system, and unique device identifiers
Pages visited, time spent on pages, and navigation paths
Click-through data and interaction with features

howWeUse.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.intro: We use the information we collect for various purposes, including:
list: To process your orders: We use your information to fulfill and manage purchases, payments, returns, and exchanges
To communicate with you: We send order confirmations, shipping updates, customer service responses, and account notifications
To personalize your experience: We tailor product recommendations, content, and marketing based on your preferences and behavior
To improve our Service: We analyze usage data to enhance features, optimize performance, and develop new products
To send marketing communications: With your consent, we send promotional emails, special offers, and newsletters
To prevent fraud and ensure security: We monitor for suspicious activity and protect against unauthorized access
To comply with legal obligations: We process data as required by law, including tax reporting and regulatory compliance
To conduct analytics and research: We aggregate and analyze data to understand trends and customer behavior
To facilitate social features: We enable features like wishlists, reviews, and social sharing
To administer promotions and contests: We manage participation in special events and promotional campaigns
howWeUse.outro: We process your personal information for these purposes based on our legitimate business interests, to fulfill our contract with you, with your consent, or to comply with our legal obligations.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies & Tracking Technologies
cookies.intro: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our Service and store certain information. Cookies are small data files stored on your device that help us improve your experience, understand usage patterns, and deliver targeted content.
typesList: Essential Cookies: Necessary for the Service to function properly, including authentication, security, and shopping cart functionality
Performance Cookies: Help us understand how visitors interact with our Service by collecting anonymous usage data
Functional Cookies: Remember your preferences and settings to enhance your experience
Targeting/Advertising Cookies: Used to deliver relevant advertisements and track campaign effectiveness
Analytics Cookies: Allow us to analyze visitor behavior and improve our Service (e.g., Google Analytics)
cookies.managingDesc: You can control and manage cookies in various ways. Most browsers allow you to refuse or delete cookies. Please note that if you choose to disable cookies, some features of our Service may not function properly.
cookies.managingNote: To opt-out of interest-based advertising, you can visit the Digital Advertising Alliance's opt-out portal or the Network Advertising Initiative's opt-out portal. For mobile devices, you can adjust your advertising preferences in your device settings.
cookies.cookieConsentDesc: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through our Cookie Settings in the footer of our website or by clicking the "Manage Cookies" button.

sharing.title: 5. Sharing Your Information
sharing.intro: We may share your information in the following situations:
list: Service Providers: We share information with third-party vendors who perform services on our behalf, such as payment processing, shipping, email delivery, analytics, marketing, and customer service. These providers are contractually obligated to protect your information and use it only for the purposes we specify.
Business Transfers: In connection with any merger, sale of company assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of our business, your information may be transferred to the acquiring entity.

Legal Requirements: We may disclose your information if required by law, court order, or governmental request, or when we believe disclosure is necessary to protect our rights, your safety, or the safety of others.
With Your Consent: We may share your information for any other purpose with your explicit consent.
Aggregated Data: We may share aggregated or anonymized data that cannot identify you personally for research, marketing, or analytical purposes.
Affiliated Companies: We may share information with our parent company, subsidiaries, and affiliates for business purposes consistent with this Privacy Policy.
sharing.noSell: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We do not share your information with unaffiliated third parties for their own marketing purposes without your consent.

security.title: 6. Data Security
security.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures designed to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. These measures include:
list: Encryption of data in transit using SSL/TLS protocols
Encryption of sensitive data at rest
Regular security assessments and vulnerability testing
Access controls and authentication requirements
Employee training on data protection and privacy
Secure data centers with physical and environmental controls
Regular backups and disaster recovery procedures
Incident response and breach notification procedures
security.disclaimer: However, please note that no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your personal information, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
security.responsibility: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. Please notify us immediately if you become aware of any unauthorized access to or use of your account.

rights.title: 7. Your Privacy Rights
rights.intro: Depending on your location and applicable laws, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information:
rights.gdprIntro: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the following rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR):
gdprList: Right to Access: You can request access to your personal information and obtain a copy of the data we hold about you
Right to Rectification: You can request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal information
Right to Erasure: You can request deletion of your personal information under certain circumstances
Right to Restrict Processing: You can request that we limit the processing of your personal information
Right to Data Portability: You can request a copy of your data in a structured, machine-readable format
Right to Object: You can object to the processing of your personal information for certain purposes
Right to Withdraw Consent: Where processing is based on consent, you can withdraw your consent at any time
Right to Lodge a Complaint: You can file a complaint with your local data protection authority
rights.ccpaIntro: If you are a California resident, you have the following rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA):
ccpaList: Right to Know: You can request information about the categories and specific pieces of personal information we have collected about you
Right to Delete: You can request deletion of your personal information, subject to certain exceptions
Right to Opt-Out: You can opt-out of the sale of your personal information (we do not sell personal information)
Right to Non-Discrimination: You have the right not to receive discriminatory treatment for exercising your CCPA rights
rights.exercisingIntro: To exercise any of your privacy rights, you can:
exercisingList: Use the data request forms linked below
rights.responseTime: We will respond to your request within 30 days. We may need to verify your identity before processing your request.

children.title: 8. Children's Privacy
children.p1: Our Service is not intended for children under 13 years of age (or under 16 in the EEA). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under these ages. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us at support@vasty.shop.
children.p2: If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a child under the applicable age without verification of parental consent, we will take steps to delete that information from our servers promptly.
children.p3: We encourage parents and guardians to monitor their children's Internet usage and help enforce this Privacy Policy by instructing their children never to provide personal information through our Service without their permission.

international.title: 9. International Data Transfers
international.p1: Your information, including personal information, may be transferred to and maintained on computers located outside of your state, province, country, or other governmental jurisdiction where data protection laws may differ from those in your jurisdiction.
international.p2: If you are located outside the United States and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the information, including personal information, to the United States and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer.
international.p3: We will take all steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy. We use appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission for transfers of personal information from the EEA to countries that do not provide adequate protection.

thirdParty.title: 10. Third-Party Links
thirdParty.p1: Our Service may contain links to third-party websites, applications, or services that are not operated by us. If you click on a third-party link, you will be directed to that third party's site. We strongly advise you to review the privacy policy of every site you visit.
thirdParty.p2: We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites or services. We do not warrant the offerings of any of these entities/individuals or their websites.
thirdParty.p3: Some examples of third-party services we may link to or integrate with include:
list: Social media platforms (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Pinterest)
Payment processors (PayPal, Stripe, Square)
Shipping carriers (UPS, FedEx, USPS)
Analytics services (Google Analytics, Mixpanel)
Customer service platforms (Zendesk, Intercom)
Email marketing services (Mailchimp, SendGrid)

retention.title: 11. Data Retention
retention.intro: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law. The criteria we use to determine retention periods include:
criteriaList: The length of time we have an ongoing relationship with you and provide our Service
Whether there is a legal obligation to which we are subject (e.g., tax, accounting, or legal requirements)
Whether retention is advisable in light of our legal position (e.g., regarding statutes of limitations, litigation, or regulatory investigations)
periodsList: Account Information: Retained while your account is active and for 3 years after account closure
Purchase History: Retained for 7 years for tax and accounting purposes
Marketing Data: Retained until you opt-out or request deletion
Customer Service Records: Retained for 3 years after the last interaction
Website Analytics: Typically aggregated and anonymized after 26 months
retention.outro: After the retention period expires, we will securely delete or anonymize your personal information in accordance with applicable law.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Privacy Policy
changes.p1: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, legal requirements, or other factors. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date at the top of this Privacy Policy.
changes.p2: For material changes, we will provide additional notice, which may include:
list: Sending you an email notification to the address associated with your account
Displaying a prominent notice on our website or mobile application
Requesting your consent for the changes where required by law
changes.p3: We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we are protecting your information. Your continued use of our Service after we post any modifications to the Privacy Policy will constitute your acknowledgment of the modifications and your consent to abide by the modified Privacy Policy.

contact.title: 13. Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us:
contact.commitment: We are committed to resolving complaints about your privacy and our collection or use of your personal information. We will investigate and attempt to resolve complaints and disputes in accordance with the principles described in this Privacy Policy.
contact.euComplaint: For EU users, you also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority if you believe we have not adequately addressed your concerns.

privacy.introText: This Privacy Policy describes how Vasty ("we," "our," or "us") collects, uses, and shares your personal information when you visit or make a purchase from our e-commerce platform. We are committed to protecting your privacy and being transparent about our data practices. This policy complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), and other applicable privacy laws.
privacy.footerNote: By using Vasty, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy. If you have any questions or concerns about how we handle your personal information, please contact our Privacy Officer at support@vasty.shop. We are committed to addressing your privacy concerns promptly and transparently.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our marketplace platform

needHelp.title: Need Help?
needHelp.description: Have questions about our terms? Our support team is here to help.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.p1: Welcome to Vasty ("we," "our," or "us"). Vasty is a multi-vendor e-commerce marketplace platform that enables vendors to create online stores and sell products to customers. These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Vasty website, mobile applications, vendor dashboard, and related services (collectively, the "Service").
introduction.p2: These Terms apply to all users of the Service, including: (a) Customers who browse and purchase products; (b) Vendors who create stores and sell products; and (c) Visitors who browse the marketplace. By accessing or using our Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
introduction.p3: We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.

acceptance.title: 2. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.p1: By creating an account (customer or vendor), placing an order, listing products for sale, or otherwise using our Service, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you are using our Service on behalf of a business, you represent that you have authority to bind that business to these Terms.
acceptance.p2: You must be at least 18 years of age to use our Service. By using our Service, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into these Terms. Vendors must be legally authorized to sell products in their jurisdiction.
acceptance.p3: We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove products or stores, or cancel orders at our sole discretion for violations of these Terms, fraudulent activity, or any other reason we deem necessary to protect our platform and users.

useOfWebsite.title: 3. Use of the Platform
useOfWebsite.permittedP1: Customers may browse products, create accounts, make purchases, leave reviews, and use features provided through the marketplace. Vendors may create stores, list products, manage orders, customize storefronts, and use vendor tools as permitted by their subscription plan.
useOfWebsite.permittedP2: You agree to use our Service only for lawful purposes. Customers must provide accurate information when placing orders. Vendors must ensure their products comply with all applicable laws and accurately represent their offerings.
prohibitedList: Sell counterfeit, stolen, illegal, or prohibited items on the marketplace
Misrepresent product descriptions, images, or specifications
Engage in price manipulation, fake reviews, or fraudulent transactions
Use the Service to transmit spam, phishing attempts, or malicious content
Impersonate Vasty, other vendors, or customers
Scrape, copy, or extract data from the platform without authorization
Interfere with, disrupt, or overload the Service or connected networks
Attempt to bypass security measures or access restricted areas
Harass, abuse, or discriminate against other users
Violate intellectual property rights of Vasty, vendors, or third parties

accountReg.title: 4. Account Registration
accountReg.creationP1: Customers can create accounts to make purchases, track orders, and save preferences. Vendors must create a vendor account to sell on Vasty. Vendor accounts require business information and are subject to approval. All users must provide accurate and complete information.
accountReg.creationP2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access. For vendor accounts, you are responsible for all activities conducted through your store(s).
accountReg.securityP1: You may not use usernames or store names that impersonate others, infringe trademarks, or are offensive. We reserve the right to reject or remove any username or store name at our discretion.
accountReg.securityP2: We recommend using strong passwords and enabling two-factor authentication. You are solely responsible for all activity under your account. Vendors are responsible for their team members' actions if team access is granted.

products.title: 5. Vendor Subscriptions & Products
products.descriptionsP1: Vasty offers subscription plans for vendors: Free, Starter ($29.99/month), Pro ($79.99/month), and Business ($199.99/month). Each plan includes different features, store limits, and capabilities as described on our pricing page. Annual billing offers a 15% discount.
products.descriptionsP2: Vasty charges zero transaction fees on all plans. Vendors keep their full earnings minus payment processing fees charged by payment providers (e.g., Stripe). Subscription fees are billed in advance and are non-refundable except as required by law.
products.pricingP1: Vendors are solely responsible for their product listings, descriptions, images, and pricing. Vasty does not verify or guarantee the accuracy of product information. Customers should review product details and vendor policies before purchasing.
products.pricingP2: Vendors must ensure products comply with all applicable laws and do not infringe intellectual property rights. Prohibited items include counterfeit goods, illegal products, weapons, drugs, and items that violate our acceptable use policy.
products.pricingP3: Vasty reserves the right to remove products or suspend vendor accounts for policy violations without prior notice.

orders.title: 6. Orders & Payment
orders.acceptanceP1: Orders are placed directly with vendors through the Vasty marketplace. Each vendor is responsible for fulfilling their orders, including shipping and customer service. Vasty facilitates the transaction but is not a party to the sale.
orders.acceptanceP2: Vendors may accept or decline orders based on their policies. Customers will be notified of order status through the platform. If an order is cancelled, refunds will be processed according to the vendor's return policy.
orders.methodsP1: Vasty uses Stripe for secure payment processing. We accept major credit cards, debit cards, and other payment methods supported by Stripe. All payments are encrypted and processed securely.
orders.methodsP2: For customer purchases, payment is collected at checkout and held until order fulfillment. Vendors receive payouts according to their payout schedule. Payment processing fees are deducted from vendor payouts.
orders.securityP1: All payment data is encrypted using industry-standard SSL/TLS protocols. We are PCI DSS compliant and do not store complete credit card information on our servers.
orders.securityP2: Vendors must not collect payment outside of the Vasty platform. Attempts to circumvent platform payments will result in account termination.

shipping.title: 7. Shipping & Delivery
shipping.p1: Each vendor sets their own shipping rates, methods, and delivery timeframes. Shipping options are displayed at checkout. Customers should review vendor shipping policies before placing orders.
shipping.p2: Vendors are responsible for shipping orders promptly and providing tracking information. Vasty is not responsible for shipping delays, lost packages, or delivery issues, but will assist in mediating disputes between customers and vendors.
shipping.p3: For international orders, customs duties and taxes are the responsibility of the customer. Vendors should clearly communicate international shipping policies and restrictions.
shipping.p4: If a package is lost or damaged in transit, customers should contact the vendor first. If the issue cannot be resolved, customers may contact Vasty support for assistance.

returns.title: 8. Returns & Refunds
returns.p1: Each vendor sets their own return and refund policies. Customers should review vendor return policies before making a purchase. Return policies are displayed on each vendor's store page.
returns.p2: To request a return, customers should contact the vendor through their order details page. Vendors are expected to respond to return requests within a reasonable timeframe and honor their stated policies.
returns.p3: If a vendor fails to honor their return policy or is unresponsive, customers may contact Vasty support. We will mediate disputes and may issue refunds in cases of clear policy violations.
returns.p4: For subscription refunds, vendors may cancel their subscription at any time. Cancelled subscriptions remain active until the end of the billing period. Refunds are not provided for partial billing periods except as required by law.

ip.title: 9. Intellectual Property
ip.p1: The Vasty platform, including its design, software, features, and branding, is owned by Vasty and protected by intellectual property laws. Vendors retain ownership of their product images, descriptions, and store content, but grant Vasty a license to display this content on the marketplace.
ip.p2: The Vasty name, logo, and branding are trademarks of Vasty. Vendors may not use Vasty trademarks in a way that implies endorsement or partnership without written permission. Vendors are responsible for ensuring their products and content do not infringe third-party intellectual property rights.
ip.p3: You may not copy, modify, reverse engineer, or create derivative works of the Vasty platform. Vendors may export their product data but may not scrape or bulk-download content from other vendors.
ip.p4: If you believe content on Vasty infringes your intellectual property rights, contact us at support@vasty.shop with details of the alleged infringement. We will investigate and take appropriate action, including removing infringing content.

liability.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: VASTY IS A MARKETPLACE PLATFORM THAT CONNECTS VENDORS AND CUSTOMERS. WE ARE NOT A PARTY TO TRANSACTIONS BETWEEN VENDORS AND CUSTOMERS. VASTY IS NOT LIABLE FOR THE QUALITY, SAFETY, LEGALITY, OR AVAILABILITY OF PRODUCTS SOLD BY VENDORS, OR FOR VENDORS' ABILITY TO COMPLETE SALES.
liability.p2: Vendors are solely responsible for their products, customer service, shipping, returns, and compliance with laws. Customers purchase at their own risk and should review vendor ratings and policies before buying.
liability.p3: TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, VASTY'S TOTAL LIABILITY TO ANY USER SHALL NOT EXCEED THE GREATER OF: (a) THE FEES PAID BY THAT USER TO VASTY IN THE 12 MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM, OR (b) $100 USD.
liability.p4: VASTY IS NOT LIABLE FOR INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, OR BUSINESS OPPORTUNITIES, ARISING FROM USE OF THE PLATFORM.

disputes.title: 11. Dispute Resolution
disputes.informalP1: Disputes between vendors and customers (e.g., product quality, shipping, refunds) should first be resolved directly between the parties through the platform's messaging system. If resolution cannot be reached, either party may contact Vasty support for mediation assistance.
disputes.arbitrationP1: Disputes with Vasty (e.g., account termination, subscription issues) should be raised with support@vasty.shop. We will attempt to resolve issues informally within 30 days.
disputes.arbitrationP2: If informal resolution fails, disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the American Arbitration Association rules. You waive the right to participate in class actions.
disputes.arbitrationP3: Either party may seek injunctive relief in court for intellectual property violations or to prevent imminent harm.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Terms
changes.p1: We may update these Terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date. For material changes, we will notify users via email or platform notification.
changes.p2: Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms. If you disagree with changes, you must stop using the Service.
changes.p3: For vendors, changes to subscription terms or fees will be communicated at least 30 days in advance, allowing time to cancel before new terms take effect.

contact.title: 13. Contact Information
contact.intro: If you have any questions about these Terms or our Service, please contact us:
contact.responseTime: We typically respond to inquiries within 24 hours. For urgent vendor issues, use the live chat in your vendor dashboard.
contact.privacyNote: For privacy-related inquiries, please refer to our Privacy Policy or contact us at support@vasty.shop.

terms.introText: These Terms and Conditions govern your use of Vasty, a multi-vendor e-commerce marketplace. By using our platform as a customer, vendor, or visitor, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you are a vendor, additional terms regarding subscriptions, payouts, and store policies also apply.
terms.footerNote: By using Vasty, you acknowledge that you have read and understood these Terms and Conditions. For questions, contact support@vasty.shop. Thank you for being part of the Vasty marketplace community.

whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you use the Vasty platform. They help us provide a seamless experience for both merchants and customers by remembering your login sessions, shopping cart contents, store preferences, and improving our platform's performance.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Required for core platform functionality including user authentication, shopping cart persistence, secure checkout, vendor dashboard access, and store management features.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how merchants and customers use our platform, enabling us to improve store builder tools, checkout flows, and overall user experience.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Used to deliver relevant product recommendations and promotional content based on your browsing behavior and purchase history.

preference.title: Preference Cookies
preference.description: Remember your language settings, currency preferences, recently viewed products, and store customization choices.

managing.title: Managing Cookies
managing.content1: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling essential cookies may prevent you from using key features like shopping cart, checkout, or vendor dashboard.
managing.content2: For the best experience on Vasty, we recommend keeping cookies enabled. You can manage your preferences anytime through your account settings or browser controls.

cookies.moreInfo: For more information about how we protect your data on Vasty, please read our Privacy Policy.

For merchants, this includes your store, products, and sales history. For customers, this includes your order history, addresses, and preferences.
